Case Studies

Every detection. Documented.

Browse 35+ real-world fault detections across industries, asset types, and outcomes.

All Water Oil & Gas Metals & Mining Chemicals Infrastructure
Water & Wastewater

Detecting Bearing Failure in Municipal Pump Before Catastrophic Collapse

A water treatment authority deployed SAM4 on their primary circulation pump and detected progressive bearing wear 6 weeks before failure was imminent.

Read case study →
Energy Production

Predictive Detection of Cavitation in Offshore Transfer Pump

Real-time electrical signatures revealed cavitation damage in an offshore platform pump, preventing an estimated $2M in unplanned maintenance costs.

Read case study →
Metals & Mining

Detecting Misalignment in Crusher Motor Before Gearbox Failure

SAM4 identified angular misalignment in a crusher drive system's coupling. Preventive realignment avoided a projected 5-day production shutdown.

Read case study →
Chemicals

Real-Time Detection of Multi-Fault Condition in Reactor Feed Pump

Three simultaneous faults detected in a critical process pump: bearing wear, belt slippage, and cavitation—each at different stages of development.

Read case study →
Water & Wastewater

Preventive Detection of Blockage in Sewage Treatment Submersible

ESA identified inlet blockage in a submersible pump before it stalled completely, enabling scheduled maintenance rather than emergency replacement.

Read case study →
Energy Production

Monitoring Thermal Stress in High-Speed Compressor Motor

Continuous electrical signature analysis revealed motor winding degradation that had been missed by traditional temperature monitoring.

Read case study →
